title: Testing Object Collaborations and Contracts · Program Brief: Oop Contract Tests
summary: Verify domain invariants, substitute implementations, event effects, persistence, and refactoring safety. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop contract tests increment in a contract-tested object system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Run one reusable behavior contract against every protocol, repository, or strategy implementation.
Choose real objects, fakes, stubs, spies, or mocks based on speed, determinism, behavior fidelity, and diagnostic value.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
